name: finance-validate
description: Iterate the research memo until structure, arithmetic, and citations are all green.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. required-sections: add the missing section and write its real content. figure-reconciliation: find which component or total is wrong and correct the underlying number — do not fudge the total. citation-integrity: define any cited-but-undefined source, and either cite or remove any defined-but-unused source. Edit only the memo file.
guardrails: Never invent or fabricate a source to satisfy citation-integrity — if a figure has no source, the figure must change or be removed, not the citation faked.
Never edit the Total line to make a reconcile block balance; correct the component figures so the arithmetic is true.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write the section.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the memo cannot yet be substantiated (e.g., a figure genuinely lacks a source). Recommend human review.
